body_transformation: The rounded head retains its small crown, now forged from molten gold with faint ember sparks flickering within its metallic grooves. The pale cream underbelly shifts to cracked obsidian plates layered with molten gold seams, while the dark brown head accents transform into charcoal-black heat-resistant scales. The curled tail tip now glows with internal crimson flames, its texture resembling cooled magma with deep orange fissures. Small smoke trails curl from the joints of its stubby legs, which are armored in heat-resistant black plating with molten gold highlights.
signature_feature: Tail tip: solidified magma with glowing crimson fissures and ember sparks.
